\noindent We then stratify with the equal method
(\ttblue{stratMeth = equal}), and view the
summary.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}%
}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
equal.stratify(strata=3, stratMeth="equal")
equal.field("stratSumm")
\end{Verbatim}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_light_blue}]
  strat  cum_bv freq   minBv    maxBv
1     1 2452927 2431    1.57  2478.93
2     2 2453455  710 2480.29  4833.28
3     3 2454434  359 4839.62 18496.21
\end{Verbatim}
